                        "import unittest\n\nfrom typing import Any\n\n# Function under test\ndef all_chars_same(s):\n    \"\"\"\n    Check whether all characters in the input string are the same.\n\n    Args:\n        s (str): Input string.\n\n    Returns:\n        bool: True if all characters are the same or string is empty, False otherwise.\n    \"\"\"\n    # Standard cases\n    def test_all_same(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"aaaa\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"bbbbbb\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"1111\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"zzzzzzzzzz\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"a\"))  # single char\n\n    def test_different_chars(self):\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"abc\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"abab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"aab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"baaa\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"aaab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"aA\"))  # three spaces\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"  \\t\"))  # two spaces and a tab\n\n    def test_long_string(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"x\" * 10000))\n        s = \"x\" * 9999 + \"y\"\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(s))\n\n    def test_non_string_input(self):\n        # The function expects a string, so passing other types should raise an error\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            all_chars_same(None)\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            all_chars_same(123)\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            all_chars_same(['a', 'a'])\n\n    def test_mixed_types_in_string(self):\n        # Numbers as characters\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"1111\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"1121\"))\n\n    def test_newlines(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"\\n\\n\\n\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"\\n\\r\\n\"))\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    unittest.main()",
                        "import unittest\n\nfrom typing import Any\n\n# The function under test\ndef all_chars_same(s):\n    \"\"\"\n    Check whether all characters in the input string are the same.\n\n    Args:\n        s (str): Input string.\n\n    Returns:\n        bool: True if all characters are the same or string is empty, False otherwise.\n    \"\"\"\n    # An empty string is considered to have all characters the same\n    if not s:\n        return True\n\n    # Compare each character to the first character\n    first_char = s[0]\n    for char in s:\n        if char != first_char:\n            return False\n    return True\n\nclass TestAllCharsSame(unittest.TestCase):\n    # Standard cases\n    def test_all_same(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"aaaa\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"bbbbbb\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"1111\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"zzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzz\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\" \" * 10))  # all spaces\n\n    def test_not_all_same(self):\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"abc\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"abab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"aab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"ba\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"a \"))\n\n    # Edge cases\n    def test_empty_string(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"\"))\n\n    def test_single_character(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"a\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"1\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\" \"))\n\n    def test_two_characters(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"aa\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"ab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"ba\"))\n\n    def test_unicode_characters(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"😊😊😊\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"😊😊😢\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"ßßß\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"ßßs\"))\n\n    def test_case_sensitivity(self):\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"AAAa\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"aaaaA\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"AAAA\"))\n\n    def test_long_string(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"x\" * 10000))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"x\" * 9999 + \"y\"))\n\n    def test_non_string_input(self):\n        # The function expects a string, so passing non-string should raise an exception\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            all_chars_same(None)\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            all_chars_same(123)\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            all_chars_same(['a', 'a', 'a'])\n\n    def test_string_with_newlines(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"\\n\\n\\n\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"\\n\\n \"))\n\n    def test_string_with_tabs(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"\\t\\t\\t\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"\\t\\t \"))\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    unittest.main()",
                        "import unittest\n\nfrom typing import Any\n\n# The function under test\ndef all_chars_same(s):\n    \"\"\"\n    Check whether all characters in the input string are the same.\n\n    Args:\n        s (str): Input string.\n\n    Returns:\n        bool: True if all characters are the same or string is empty, False otherwise.\n    \"\"\"\n    # An empty string is considered to have all characters the same\n    if not s:\n        return True\n\n    # Compare each character to the first character\n    first_char = s[0]\n    for char in s:\n        if char != first_char:\n            return False\n    return True\n\nclass TestAllCharsSame(unittest.TestCase):\n    # Standard cases\n    def test_all_same(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"aaaa\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"bbbbbb\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"1111\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"zzzzzzzzzz\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"a\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"0\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\" \"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"$$$\"))\n    \n    def test_not_all_same(self):\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"abc\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"abab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"aab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"baa\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"aA\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"a \"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"a1a\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"a1\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"1a\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"a\"*100 + \"b\"))\n\n    # Edge cases\n    def test_empty_string(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"\"))\n    \n    def test_single_character(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"x\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"0\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\" \"))\n    \n    def test_unicode_characters(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"éééé\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"éééè\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"😊😊😊\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"😊😊😢\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"𝔸𝔸𝔸\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"𝔸𝔸A\"))\n    \n    def test_long_strings(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"a\" * 100000))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"a\" * 99999 + \"b\"))\n    \n    def test_mixed_case(self):\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"AAAa\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"aAA\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"A\"*50))\n    \n    def test_special_characters(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"$$$\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"$%$\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"\\n\\n\\n\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"\\n\\r\\n\"))\n    \n    def test_non_string_input(self):\n        # The function expects a string, so passing non-string should raise TypeError\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            all_chars_same(None)\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            all_chars_same(123)\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            all_chars_same(['a', 'a', 'a'])\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            all_chars_same({'a':1})\n\n    def test_bytes_and_bytearray(self):\n        # bytes and bytearray are not str, should raise TypeError\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            all_chars_same(b\"aaa\")\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            all_chars_same(bytearray(b\"aaa\"))\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    unittest.main()"

all spaces\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"  \\t  \"))  # spaces and tab\n\n    def test_unicode_characters(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"😊😊😊\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"😊😢😊\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"ßßß\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"ßaß\"))\n\n    def test_mixed_case(self):\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"AAAa\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"AAA\"))\n\n    def test_symbols(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"$$$\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"$%$\"))\n\n    def test_long_string(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"z\" * 10000))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"z\" * 9999 + \"y\"))\n\n    def test_non_string_input(self):\n        # Should raise TypeError if input is not a string\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            all_chars_same(None)\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            all_chars_same(1234)\n        with self.assertRaises(TypeError):\n            all_chars_same(['a', 'a', 'a'])\n\n    #                         "import unittest\n\nfrom typing import AnyStr\n\n# The function under test\ndef all_chars_same(s: AnyStr) -> bool:\n    \"\"\"\n    Check whether all characters in the input string are the same.\n\n    Args:\n        s (str): Input string.\n\n    Returns:\n        bool: True if all characters are the same or string is empty, False otherwise.\n    \"\"\"\n    # An empty string or a single character string is considered to have all characters the same\n    # Using set to check uniqueness efficiently\n    return len(set(s)) <= 1\n\nclass TestAllCharsSame(unittest.TestCase):\n    # Standard functionality tests\n    def test_all_same_chars(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"aaaa\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"bbbbbb\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"1111\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"zzzzzzzzzzzz\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"$$$$$\"))\n    \n    def test_different_chars(self):\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"abc\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"abab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"1234\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"aab\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"a\" * 50 + \"b\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"aA\"))  # Case-sensitive\n\n    # Edge cases\n    def test_empty_string(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"\"))\n\n    def test_single_character(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"a\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"1\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"Z\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"$\"))\n\n    def test_unicode_characters(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"😀😀😀\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"😀😁😀\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"éééé\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"éèé\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"𝄞𝄞𝄞\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"𝄞𝄢\"))\n\n    def test_whitespace(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"     \"))  # all spaces\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\" \\t \"))  # space, tab, space\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\" \\n\"))   # space, newline\n\n    def test_long_strings(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"x\" * 10000))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"x\" * 9999 + \"y\"))\n\n    def test_non_string_input(self):\n        # Should work for bytes as well if passed\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(b\"aaaa\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(b\"ab\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(b\"\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(b\"a\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(b\"aA\"))\n\n    def test_mixed_types(self):\n        # Should not raise, but will return False for mixed types in bytes\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(b\"a1\"))\n        # For string, mixed types are just different characters\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"a1\"))\n\n    def test_special_characters(self):\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"!!!\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"!@!\"))\n        self.assertTrue(all_chars_same(\"_____\"))\n        self.assertFalse(all_chars_same(\"_-__\"))\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    unittest.main()"
